title: Interlock in 200 Parts
artist_persona: An artist working at the intersection of architecture and abstract geometry
description: A precision-crafted geometric study that echoes the Mid Century Modern-inspired architecture of the space. Intersecting planes in #030301, #1f160e, and #4c3b2a create depth that draws the eye across the 200cm width. The subtle contrast relates to the room's low lighting, while the compositional rhythm mirrors the 0.84 proportion of vertical to horizontal lines in the room.
artwork_rationale: This piece responds to the room's Mid Century Modern architecture (high confidence) with its subtle composition. The intimately scaled ceiling (3.2m) and cozy soft lighting conditions informed the scale and contrast. At 3.8m viewing distance, the large statement format fills the optimal field of view.
color_rationale: The palette draws from the room's dominant #030301 and accent #1f160e tones, ensuring analogous harmony with the existing warm interior. The medium vibrancy level matches the room's subdued character.
image_prompt: A high-end digital artwork titled 'Interlock in 200 Parts', large statement format. A precision-crafted geometric study that echoes the Mid Century Modern-inspired architecture of the space. Intersecting planes in #030301, #1f160e, and #4c3b2a create depth that draws the eye across the 200cm width. The subtle contrast relates to the room's low lighting, while the compositional rhythm mirrors the 0.84 proportion of vertical to horizontal lines in the room. The piece is museum-quality, suitable for a luxury interior. Color palette centered on #030301 with #1f160e accents. Style: structured elegant. The artwork should feel like a commissioned gallery piece — not generic, not templated, but intentionally made for this specific room with Mid Century Modern architecture.

recommended_frame.description: A slim black steel channel frame — nearly invisible — that lets the geometric composition speak directly to the wall. Mounted on a cleat system for perfect alignment.

recommended_lighting.description: An ultra-thin linear LED strip mounted behind the frame's top edge, casting a soft wash down the surface. 3500K for crisp geometric clarity.

recommended_placement: Secondary wall or above a console table, smaller scale as an accent counterpoint
